title: Frontend: Glassmorphism styling for theme and components
acceptance_criteria: Chakra theme updated with glassmorphism: backdropFilter blur(10px) on card backgrounds
Semi-transparent cards with rgba backgrounds (e.g., rgba(255,255,255,0.05))
Border with low-opacity white (e.g., rgba(255,255,255,0.1)) on card components
Border radius (borderRadius) and border width (borderWidth) on card boxes
Frost effect applied consistently across card-like components
No new external CSS libraries required
